description: You are maintaining the 'auth-service' project. A critical security vulnerability (timing attack) was fixed in the 'feature/v2-upgrade' branch, but that branch is not ready for release as it contains unstable Work-In-Progress (WIP) code. Cherry-pick the commit with the message 'FIX: Use constant-time comparison to prevent timing attacks' from the 'feature/v2-upgrade' branch into the 'main' branch. Ensure the fix is applied (AuthUtils.java uses MessageDigest.isEqual) but the WIP code (OAuth2 stubs) is not present. The project must compile successfully.

metadata.required_commit_msg: FIX: Use constant-time comparison to prevent timing attacks
